name: claude-patent-creator
description: MPEP-based Patent Creator - Intelligent patent creation guidance using vector search over the Manual of Patent Examining Procedure

scripts.postinstall:
pip install -r mcp_server/requirements.txt && echo '
 MCP server installed!

📚 Next steps:
1. Download MPEP PDFs from USPTO
2. Place PDFs in mcp_server/ directory
3. Run: python mcp_server/server.py --rebuild-index
4. Restart Claude Code and use /mcp to verify
'

author: RobThePCGuy

mcp.description: Search and analyze USPTO MPEP content for patent examination guidance
